es.cs_cs_001_challenges_li_2_1: A significant portion of the working day is lost due to “context switching” – constantly logging in and out of different systems.

es.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_0: Small and medium-sized businesses are often slowed down by deep-rooted inefficiencies. Our research found that the biggest barrier to their growth was not a lack of tools, but an excess of disjointed tools. Your daily operations are typically spread across a mix of spreadsheets, emails, CRMs and messaging apps. This fragmented approach creates significant problems: scattered data, duplicated work, lack of visibility for managers, and critical communication gaps. This pain was particularly acute for mobile and field workers, who were often disconnected from the essential tools and real-time updates they need to do their jobs.
es.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_1: The data backs up this frustration:
es.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_0: Jugl successfully addresses SMBs' critical pain points by replacing a chaotic mix of tools with a single, optimized platform. This case study demonstrates the value of a user-centered approach that translates deep user understanding into a product that delivers measurable results.
es.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_1: A single platform gives users a sense of control and relief.
es.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_2: Usability test data allowed us to go beyond assumptions and fix real-world issues before launch.
es.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_3: For modern SMBs, seamless functionality on the go is essential for adoption.
es.cs_cs_001_goal_p_0: We built Jugl, a comprehensive SaaS platform, to solve the key operational challenges of small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) by breaking down their operational silos. An intuitive all-in-one tool, Jugl serves as a central collaboration platform that connects different teams - from management to field sales - and unifies them on a single platform. Our focus on mobile accessibility and seamless integration resulted in a unified workflow across web and mobile applications, enabling effortless and efficient teamwork.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_0: In order to meet these challenges head-on, we designed Jugl as a central source of information for SMEs. It consolidates a business's essential functions into one intuitive and powerful platform.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_1: Assign, track and manage all team tasks in one central location.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_10: Enable the entire team to stay productive from anywhere, at any time.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_2: Centralize conversations, file sharing, and secure audio/video calls with internal teams, external customers, and suppliers.

es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_4: Enables seamless collaboration between different companies by creating shared, permission-based workspaces for shared projects.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_5: Streamline order fulfillment and allocate company resources with maximum efficiency.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_6: Track inventory and manage inventory directly within the platform.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_7: Simplify employee onboarding, vacation requests, and other key HR processes.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_8: A comprehensive module to promote employee growth. Set individual and team goals, track performance, and promote a positive work culture through an integrated awards and recognition system.
es.cs_cs_001_solution_p_9: Get instant, actionable insights with smart, easy-to-understand dashboards.

es.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_0: Many companies use dispersed networks and unofficial channels to find leadership talent.
es.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_1: Significant time is lost due to manual outreach and scattered candidate assessments.
es.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_2: Satisfaction with traditional search methods is consistently low, coupled with strong demand for a specialized, transparent and technically sound process.
es.cs_cs_002_challenges_p_0: Technology-focused organizations often struggle to find the right leadership talent to drive innovation and growth. Our research shows that the biggest barrier is not a lack of candidates, but the difficulty of identifying, evaluating and retaining high-quality leaders who are both a technical and cultural fit. Traditional search methods that rely on generic approaches and fragmented communication fall short for these specialized roles. This creates significant problems, including lengthened hiring cycles, bad hires, and a lack of confidentiality that senior leaders require.
es.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_0: This challenge was best understood through our user interviews:
es.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_2: She struggled to coordinate executive searches across spreadsheets and email threads. She was under constant pressure for updates and risked losing top candidates to slow processes. She needed a single platform to manage searches and make data-driven decisions.
es.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_3: He was overwhelmed by generic approaches from recruiters who ignored his technical background and career goals. He feared that exploring new roles could jeopardize his reputation at his current company. He wanted a discreet, trustworthy partner who would connect him with roles that matched his ambitions and skills.
es.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_0: Purple Quarter successfully addresses the unique challenges of recruiting tech executives by replacing generic, fragmented processes with a tailored, transparent platform. This case study shows how a user-centric approach that implements deep customer and candidate insights delivers quantifiable and lasting value.
es.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_1: A generic approach is ineffective for high-profile tech leadership roles. A specialized platform that understands the nuances of technology and culture is essential.
es.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_2: The platform must provide a seamless, confidential and respectful experience for both the hiring client and the high-level candidate.
es.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_3: In a traditionally opaque industry, providing customers with a clear, data-driven view of search progress is a powerful differentiator that builds trust and strengthens partnerships.
es.cs_cs_002_goal_p_0: We designed Purple Quarter, a specialist executive search firm, to solve the critical talent challenges of technology-driven organizations. Our goal was to bridge the gap between visionary companies and exceptional technology leaders. As an insight-driven partner, Purple Quarter serves as a strategic connector that aligns leading technology experts with an organization's specific technical and cultural goals. By emphasizing deep technical knowledge and a tailored search approach, we ensure that the executive hiring process for our clients is smooth, trustworthy and strategic.

es.cs_cs_002_solution_p_2: Our platform allows clients to track search activity, view candidate details, and hire executives safely and efficiently. It also includes a pre-screened talent pool for quick access to qualified candidates.
es.cs_cs_002_solution_p_3: We go beyond job titles to specify the precise skills, experience, leadership style and cultural fit required for a role to ensure a perfect match.

es.cs_cs_003_challenges_p_0: Online betting platforms often overwhelm users with dense information, unclear odds representation and fragmented workflows. Our research found that the biggest challenge for bettors was not the lack of options, but the difficulty of quickly understanding and responding to them.
es.cs_cs_003_challenges_p_0_0: These issues were particularly critical during live betting, where delays or errors directly impact user trust and engagement.
es.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_1: In the end, our approach proved that powerful analytics doesn't have to be overwhelming. By combining simplicity, tailored experiences and trust-focused design with fast performance and continuous refinement, we have transformed a complex data platform into an intuitive, engaging tool. This balance of depth and usability ensured that users could focus on insights - not on understanding the interface.
es.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_3: A common design system should guide typography, colors and spacing for web and mobile.
es.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_4: Highlight urgent tasks such as upcoming courses or outstanding assignments via secondary modules.
es.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_5: Use tabs or collapsible sections to reduce vertical scrolling.
es.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_6: Ensure the right contrast, always combine icons with text and avoid unnecessary text shortening.
es.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_7: Start with mobile restrictions to ensure a smoother experience for the primary user group.
es.cs_cs_003_goal_p_0: We designed STX, a next-generation online betting platform, to provide a fast, intuitive and transparent betting experience for sports as well as non-traditional markets such as politics and culture. The main goal was to simplify decision-making in a high-pressure, real-time environment while ensuring trust, security and performance at scale. STX was designed as a mobile-first product with full consistency between web and iOS to ensure a seamless experience no matter how or where users place their bets. Our focus has been on reducing friction throughout the entire betting journey – from market decision making to bet placement and portfolio tracking – supporting both casual and experienced bettors.

With the right mix of design consistency, accessibility and technical precision, Saltbox is now better equipped to help its customers scale their digital commerce journeys faster and smarter.
es.cs_cs_004_conclusion_p_3: A reusable system accelerates development while strengthening the brand.
es.cs_cs_004_conclusion_p_4: Inclusive design increases acceptance among different user groups.

es.cs_cs_004_goal_p_0: Saltbox is a dynamic Salesforce consulting practice with a bold vision – to redefine the way B2B and D2C commerce works in industries such as manufacturing, consumer goods and life sciences. Powered by Salesforce Ventures, their customers rely on them to lead complex digital transformations with speed and precision.
es.cs_cs_004_goal_p_1: To support this, Saltbox needed a design partner who could keep up with their pace, improve their user experience, and bring consistency across all Salesforce-based interfaces. Our team worked with Saltbox to build a scalable, on-brand, and accessible user interface system based on the Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) to ensure every touchpoint was as seamless as the solutions they delivered.
es.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_0: Our approach was based on deep collaboration and agile delivery:
es.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_1: Understanding Saltbox's internal needs and customer workflows to align design goals with business priorities.
es.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_2: Developed a scalable, tokenized design framework that works seamlessly with SLDS.
es.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_3: Deliver reusable components with built-in accessibility – tested across devices and user roles.
es.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_4: Document usage patterns, tokens and policies to enable internal Saltbox teams to independently develop the system after deployment.

es.cs_cs_004_solution_p_5: We leveraged SLDS native components such as lightning-button, lightning-card, and lightning-datatable to reduce development effort and ensure consistency.

__genesis.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_0: Small and medium-sized businesses are often slowed down by deep-rooted inefficiencies. Our research found that the biggest barrier to their growth was not a lack of tools, but an excess of disjointed tools. Your daily operations are typically spread across a mix of spreadsheets, emails, CRMs and messaging apps. This fragmented approach creates significant problems: scattered data, duplicated work, lack of visibility for managers, and critical communication gaps. This pain was particularly acute for mobile and field workers, who were often disconnected from the essential tools and real-time updates they need to do their jobs.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_1: The data backs up this frustration:
__genesis.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_0: Jugl successfully addresses SMBs' critical pain points by replacing a chaotic mix of tools with a single, optimized platform. This case study demonstrates the value of a user-centered approach that translates deep user understanding into a product that delivers measurable results.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_1: A single platform gives users a sense of control and relief.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_2: Usability test data allowed us to go beyond assumptions and fix real-world issues before launch.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_3: For modern SMBs, seamless functionality on the go is essential for adoption.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_goal_p_0: We built Jugl, a comprehensive SaaS platform, to solve the key operational challenges of small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) by breaking down their operational silos. An intuitive all-in-one tool, Jugl serves as a central collaboration platform that connects different teams - from management to field sales - and unifies them on a single platform. Our focus on mobile accessibility and seamless integration resulted in a unified workflow across web and mobile applications, enabling effortless and efficient teamwork.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_0: In order to meet these challenges head-on, we designed Jugl as a central source of information for SMEs. It consolidates a business's essential functions into one intuitive and powerful platform.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_1: Assign, track and manage all team tasks in one central location.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_10: Enable the entire team to stay productive from anywhere, at any time.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_2: Centralize conversations, file sharing, and secure audio/video calls with internal teams, external customers, and suppliers.

__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_4: Enables seamless collaboration between different companies by creating shared, permission-based workspaces for shared projects.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_5: Streamline order fulfillment and allocate company resources with maximum efficiency.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_6: Track inventory and manage inventory directly within the platform.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_7: Simplify employee onboarding, vacation requests, and other key HR processes.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_8: A comprehensive module to promote employee growth. Set individual and team goals, track performance, and promote a positive work culture through an integrated awards and recognition system.
__genesis.cs_cs_001_solution_p_9: Get instant, actionable insights with smart, easy-to-understand dashboards.

__genesis.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_0: Many companies use dispersed networks and unofficial channels to find leadership talent.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_1: Significant time is lost due to manual outreach and scattered candidate assessments.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_2: Satisfaction with traditional search methods is consistently low, coupled with strong demand for a specialized, transparent and technically sound process.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_challenges_p_0: Technology-focused organizations often struggle to find the right leadership talent to drive innovation and growth. Our research shows that the biggest barrier is not a lack of candidates, but the difficulty of identifying, evaluating and retaining high-quality leaders who are both a technical and cultural fit. Traditional search methods that rely on generic approaches and fragmented communication fall short for these specialized roles. This creates significant problems, including lengthened hiring cycles, bad hires, and a lack of confidentiality that senior leaders require.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_0: This challenge was best understood through our user interviews:
__genesis.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_2: She struggled to coordinate executive searches across spreadsheets and email threads. She was under constant pressure for updates and risked losing top candidates to slow processes. She needed a single platform to manage searches and make data-driven decisions.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_3: He was overwhelmed by generic approaches from recruiters who ignored his technical background and career goals. He feared that exploring new roles could jeopardize his reputation at his current company. He wanted a discreet, trustworthy partner who would connect him with roles that matched his ambitions and skills.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_0: Purple Quarter successfully addresses the unique challenges of recruiting tech executives by replacing generic, fragmented processes with a tailored, transparent platform. This case study shows how a user-centric approach that implements deep customer and candidate insights delivers quantifiable and lasting value.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_1: A generic approach is ineffective for high-profile tech leadership roles. A specialized platform that understands the nuances of technology and culture is essential.
__genesis.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_2: The platform must provide a seamless, confidential and respectful experience for both the hiring client and the high-level candidate.

__genesis.cs_cs_003_goal_p_0: We designed STX, a next-generation online betting platform, to provide a fast, intuitive and transparent betting experience for sports as well as non-traditional markets such as politics and culture. The main goal was to simplify decision-making in a high-pressure, real-time environment while ensuring trust, security and performance at scale. STX was designed as a mobile-first product with full consistency between web and iOS to ensure a seamless experience no matter how or where users place their bets. Our focus has been on reducing friction throughout the entire betting journey – from market decision making to bet placement and portfolio tracking – supporting both casual and experienced bettors.

Our WhatsApp and Instagram bots engage users 24/7, handling inquiries and capturing leads automatically. With smart CRM integration, we streamline your sales funnel by connecting bots directly to your systems, boosting efficiency and conversions.
ta.services_frontend_desc: We build modern, high-performance web apps using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript. With Tailwind CSS, we ensure pixel-perfect responsiveness across all devices. Our development process includes automated CI/CD pipelines via GitHub, delivering seamless updates, improved efficiency, and reliable, scalable applications tailored to meet your business goals with precision.
ta.services_digital_marketing_desc: We help grow your brand through strategic community building on platforms like Meta and Google. Our SEO strategies boost your visibility, while targeted ad campaigns reach ideal customers for maximum ROI. With content tailored to attract, engage, and convert, we turn your audience into loyal customers and leads.

ta.cs_cs_001_challenges_li_2_1: A significant portion of the working day is lost due to “context switching” – constantly logging in and out of different systems.

ta.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_0: Small and medium-sized businesses are often slowed down by deep-rooted inefficiencies. Our research found that the biggest barrier to their growth was not a lack of tools, but an excess of disjointed tools. Your daily operations are typically spread across a mix of spreadsheets, emails, CRMs and messaging apps. This fragmented approach creates significant problems: scattered data, duplicated work, lack of visibility for managers, and critical communication gaps. This pain was particularly acute for mobile and field workers, who were often disconnected from the essential tools and real-time updates they need to do their jobs.
ta.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_1: The data backs up this frustration:
ta.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_0: Jugl successfully addresses SMBs' critical pain points by replacing a chaotic mix of tools with a single, optimized platform. This case study demonstrates the value of a user-centered approach that translates deep user understanding into a product that delivers measurable results.
ta.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_1: A single platform gives users a sense of control and relief.
ta.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_2: Usability test data allowed us to go beyond assumptions and fix real-world issues before launch.
ta.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_3: For modern SMBs, seamless functionality on the go is essential for adoption.
ta.cs_cs_001_goal_p_0: We built Jugl, a comprehensive SaaS platform, to solve the key operational challenges of small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) by breaking down their operational silos. An intuitive all-in-one tool, Jugl serves as a central collaboration platform that connects different teams - from management to field sales - and unifies them on a single platform. Our focus on mobile accessibility and seamless integration resulted in a unified workflow across web and mobile applications, enabling effortless and efficient teamwork.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_0: In order to meet these challenges head-on, we designed Jugl as a central source of information for SMEs. It consolidates a business's essential functions into one intuitive and powerful platform.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_1: Assign, track and manage all team tasks in one central location.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_10: Enable the entire team to stay productive from anywhere, at any time.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_2: Centralize conversations, file sharing, and secure audio/video calls with internal teams, external customers, and suppliers.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_3: Provide teams and clients with a dedicated, secure space to store, access and share important documents and project files.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_4: Enables seamless collaboration between different companies by creating shared, permission-based workspaces for shared projects.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_5: Streamline order fulfillment and allocate company resources with maximum efficiency.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_6: Track inventory and manage inventory directly within the platform.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_7: Simplify employee onboarding, vacation requests, and other key HR processes.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_8: A comprehensive module to promote employee growth. Set individual and team goals, track performance, and promote a positive work culture through an integrated awards and recognition system.
ta.cs_cs_001_solution_p_9: Get instant, actionable insights with smart, easy-to-understand dashboards.

ta.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_0: Many companies use dispersed networks and unofficial channels to find leadership talent.
ta.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_1: Significant time is lost due to manual outreach and scattered candidate assessments.
ta.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_2: Satisfaction with traditional search methods is consistently low, coupled with strong demand for a specialized, transparent and technically sound process.
ta.cs_cs_002_challenges_p_0: Technology-focused organizations often struggle to find the right leadership talent to drive innovation and growth. Our research shows that the biggest barrier is not a lack of candidates, but the difficulty of identifying, evaluating and retaining high-quality leaders who are both a technical and cultural fit. Traditional search methods that rely on generic approaches and fragmented communication fall short for these specialized roles. This creates significant problems, including lengthened hiring cycles, bad hires, and a lack of confidentiality that senior leaders require.
ta.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_0: This challenge was best understood through our user interviews:
ta.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_2: She struggled to coordinate executive searches across spreadsheets and email threads. She was under constant pressure for updates and risked losing top candidates to slow processes. She needed a single platform to manage searches and make data-driven decisions.
ta.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_3: He was overwhelmed by generic approaches from recruiters who ignored his technical background and career goals. He feared that exploring new roles could jeopardize his reputation at his current company. He wanted a discreet, trustworthy partner who would connect him with roles that matched his ambitions and skills.
ta.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_0: Purple Quarter successfully addresses the unique challenges of recruiting tech executives by replacing generic, fragmented processes with a tailored, transparent platform. This case study shows how a user-centric approach that implements deep customer and candidate insights delivers quantifiable and lasting value.
ta.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_1: A generic approach is ineffective for high-profile tech leadership roles. A specialized platform that understands the nuances of technology and culture is essential.
ta.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_2: The platform must provide a seamless, confidential and respectful experience for both the hiring client and the high-level candidate.
ta.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_3: In a traditionally opaque industry, providing customers with a clear, data-driven view of search progress is a powerful differentiator that builds trust and strengthens partnerships.
ta.cs_cs_002_goal_p_0: We designed Purple Quarter, a specialist executive search firm, to solve the critical talent challenges of technology-driven organizations. Our goal was to bridge the gap between visionary companies and exceptional technology leaders. As an insight-driven partner, Purple Quarter serves as a strategic connector that aligns leading technology experts with an organization's specific technical and cultural goals. By emphasizing deep technical knowledge and a tailored search approach, we ensure that the executive hiring process for our clients is smooth, trustworthy and strategic.

ta.cs_cs_002_solution_p_1: We offer dedicated, ongoing technology leadership recruitment with accelerated searches and cost savings through a stable, long-term relationship.
ta.cs_cs_002_solution_p_2: Our platform allows clients to track search activity, view candidate details, and hire executives safely and efficiently. It also includes a pre-screened talent pool for quick access to qualified candidates.
ta.cs_cs_002_solution_p_3: We go beyond job titles to specify the precise skills, experience, leadership style and cultural fit required for a role to ensure a perfect match.

ta.cs_cs_003_challenges_p_0: Online betting platforms often overwhelm users with dense information, unclear odds representation and fragmented workflows. Our research found that the biggest challenge for bettors was not the lack of options, but the difficulty of quickly understanding and responding to them.
ta.cs_cs_003_challenges_p_0_0: These issues were particularly critical during live betting, where delays or errors directly impact user trust and engagement.
ta.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_1: In the end, our approach proved that powerful analytics doesn't have to be overwhelming. By combining simplicity, tailored experiences and trust-focused design with fast performance and continuous refinement, we have transformed a complex data platform into an intuitive, engaging tool. This balance of depth and usability ensured that users could focus on insights - not on understanding the interface.
ta.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_3: A common design system should guide typography, colors and spacing for web and mobile.
ta.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_4: Highlight urgent tasks such as upcoming courses or outstanding assignments via secondary modules.
ta.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_5: Use tabs or collapsible sections to reduce vertical scrolling.
ta.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_6: Ensure the right contrast, always combine icons with text and avoid unnecessary text shortening.
ta.cs_cs_003_conclusion_p_7: Start with mobile restrictions to ensure a smoother experience for the primary user group.
ta.cs_cs_003_goal_p_0: We designed STX, a next-generation online betting platform, to provide a fast, intuitive and transparent betting experience for sports as well as non-traditional markets such as politics and culture. The main goal was to simplify decision-making in a high-pressure, real-time environment while ensuring trust, security and performance at scale. STX was designed as a mobile-first product with full consistency between web and iOS to ensure a seamless experience no matter how or where users place their bets. Our focus has been on reducing friction throughout the entire betting journey – from market decision making to bet placement and portfolio tracking – supporting both casual and experienced bettors.

ta.cs_cs_004_goal_p_0: Saltbox is a dynamic Salesforce consulting practice with a bold vision – to redefine the way B2B and D2C commerce works in industries such as manufacturing, consumer goods and life sciences. Powered by Salesforce Ventures, their customers rely on them to lead complex digital transformations with speed and precision.
ta.cs_cs_004_goal_p_1: To support this, Saltbox needed a design partner who could keep up with their pace, improve their user experience, and bring consistency across all Salesforce-based interfaces. Our team worked with Saltbox to build a scalable, on-brand, and accessible user interface system based on the Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS) to ensure every touchpoint was as seamless as the solutions they delivered.
ta.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_0: Our approach was based on deep collaboration and agile delivery:
ta.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_1: Understanding Saltbox's internal needs and customer workflows to align design goals with business priorities.
ta.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_2: Developed a scalable, tokenized design framework that works seamlessly with SLDS.
ta.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_3: Deliver reusable components with built-in accessibility – tested across devices and user roles.
ta.cs_cs_004_ourProcess_p_4: Document usage patterns, tokens and policies to enable internal Saltbox teams to independently develop the system after deployment.

de.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_0: Small and medium-sized businesses are often slowed down by deep-rooted inefficiencies. Our research found that the biggest barrier to their growth was not a lack of tools, but an excess of disjointed tools. Your daily operations are typically spread across a mix of spreadsheets, emails, CRMs and messaging apps. This fragmented approach creates significant problems: scattered data, duplicated work, lack of visibility for managers, and critical communication gaps. This pain was particularly acute for mobile and field workers, who were often disconnected from the essential tools and real-time updates they need to do their jobs.
de.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_1: The data backs up this frustration:
de.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_0: Jugl successfully addresses SMBs' critical pain points by replacing a chaotic mix of tools with a single, optimized platform. This case study demonstrates the value of a user-centered approach that translates deep user understanding into a product that delivers measurable results.
de.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_1: A single platform gives users a sense of control and relief.
de.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_2: Usability test data allowed us to go beyond assumptions and fix real-world issues before launch.
de.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_3: For modern SMBs, seamless functionality on the go is essential for adoption.
de.cs_cs_001_goal_p_0: We built Jugl, a comprehensive SaaS platform, to solve the key operational challenges of small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) by breaking down their operational silos. An intuitive all-in-one tool, Jugl serves as a central collaboration platform that connects different teams - from management to field sales - and unifies them on a single platform. Our focus on mobile accessibility and seamless integration resulted in a unified workflow across web and mobile applications, enabling effortless and efficient teamwork.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_0: In order to meet these challenges head-on, we designed Jugl as a central source of information for SMEs. It consolidates a business's essential functions into one intuitive and powerful platform.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_1: Assign, track and manage all team tasks in one central location.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_10: Enable the entire team to stay productive from anywhere, at any time.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_2: Centralize conversations, file sharing, and secure audio/video calls with internal teams, external customers, and suppliers.

de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_4: Enables seamless collaboration between different companies by creating shared, permission-based workspaces for shared projects.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_5: Streamline order fulfillment and allocate company resources with maximum efficiency.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_6: Track inventory and manage inventory directly within the platform.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_7: Simplify employee onboarding, vacation requests, and other key HR processes.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_8: A comprehensive module to promote employee growth. Set individual and team goals, track performance, and promote a positive work culture through an integrated awards and recognition system.
de.cs_cs_001_solution_p_9: Get instant, actionable insights with smart, easy-to-understand dashboards.

de.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_0: Many companies use dispersed networks and unofficial channels to find leadership talent.
de.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_1: Significant time is lost due to manual outreach and scattered candidate assessments.
de.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_2: Satisfaction with traditional search methods is consistently low, coupled with strong demand for a specialized, transparent and technically sound process.
de.cs_cs_002_challenges_p_0: Technology-focused organizations often struggle to find the right leadership talent to drive innovation and growth. Our research shows that the biggest barrier is not a lack of candidates, but the difficulty of identifying, evaluating and retaining high-quality leaders who are both a technical and cultural fit. Traditional search methods that rely on generic approaches and fragmented communication fall short for these specialized roles. This creates significant problems, including lengthened hiring cycles, bad hires, and a lack of confidentiality that senior leaders require.
de.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_0: This challenge was best understood through our user interviews:
de.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_2: She struggled to coordinate executive searches across spreadsheets and email threads. She was under constant pressure for updates and risked losing top candidates to slow processes. She needed a single platform to manage searches and make data-driven decisions.
de.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_3: He was overwhelmed by generic approaches from recruiters who ignored his technical background and career goals. He feared that exploring new roles could jeopardize his reputation at his current company. He wanted a discreet, trustworthy partner who would connect him with roles that matched his ambitions and skills.
de.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_0: Purple Quarter successfully addresses the unique challenges of recruiting tech executives by replacing generic, fragmented processes with a tailored, transparent platform. This case study shows how a user-centric approach that implements deep customer and candidate insights delivers quantifiable and lasting value.
de.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_1: A generic approach is ineffective for high-profile tech leadership roles. A specialized platform that understands the nuances of technology and culture is essential.
de.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_2: The platform must provide a seamless, confidential and respectful experience for both the hiring client and the high-level candidate.
de.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_3: In a traditionally opaque industry, providing customers with a clear, data-driven view of search progress is a powerful differentiator that builds trust and strengthens partnerships.
de.cs_cs_002_goal_p_0: We designed Purple Quarter, a specialist executive search firm, to solve the critical talent challenges of technology-driven organizations. Our goal was to bridge the gap between visionary companies and exceptional technology leaders. As an insight-driven partner, Purple Quarter serves as a strategic connector that aligns leading technology experts with an organization's specific technical and cultural goals. By emphasizing deep technical knowledge and a tailored search approach, we ensure that the executive hiring process for our clients is smooth, trustworthy and strategic.

de.cs_cs_003_goal_p_0: We designed STX, a next-generation online betting platform, to provide a fast, intuitive and transparent betting experience for sports as well as non-traditional markets such as politics and culture. The main goal was to simplify decision-making in a high-pressure, real-time environment while ensuring trust, security and performance at scale. STX was designed as a mobile-first product with full consistency between web and iOS to ensure a seamless experience no matter how or where users place their bets. Our focus has been on reducing friction throughout the entire betting journey – from market decision making to bet placement and portfolio tracking – supporting both casual and experienced bettors.

sn.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_0: Small and medium-sized businesses are often slowed down by deep-rooted inefficiencies. Our research found that the biggest barrier to their growth was not a lack of tools, but an excess of disjointed tools. Your daily operations are typically spread across a mix of spreadsheets, emails, CRMs and messaging apps. This fragmented approach creates significant problems: scattered data, duplicated work, lack of visibility for managers, and critical communication gaps. This pain was particularly acute for mobile and field workers, who were often disconnected from the essential tools and real-time updates they need to do their jobs.
sn.cs_cs_001_challenges_p_1: The data backs up this frustration:
sn.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_0: Jugl successfully addresses SMBs' critical pain points by replacing a chaotic mix of tools with a single, optimized platform. This case study demonstrates the value of a user-centered approach that translates deep user understanding into a product that delivers measurable results.
sn.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_1: A single platform gives users a sense of control and relief.
sn.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_2: Usability test data allowed us to go beyond assumptions and fix real-world issues before launch.
sn.cs_cs_001_conclusion_p_3: For modern SMBs, seamless functionality on the go is essential for adoption.
sn.cs_cs_001_goal_p_0: We built Jugl, a comprehensive SaaS platform, to solve the key operational challenges of small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) by breaking down their operational silos. An intuitive all-in-one tool, Jugl serves as a central collaboration platform that connects different teams - from management to field sales - and unifies them on a single platform. Our focus on mobile accessibility and seamless integration resulted in a unified workflow across web and mobile applications, enabling effortless and efficient teamwork.
sn.cs_cs_001_solution_p_0: In order to meet these challenges head-on, we designed Jugl as a central source of information for SMEs. It consolidates a business's essential functions into one intuitive and powerful platform.
sn.cs_cs_001_solution_p_1: Assign, track and manage all team tasks in one central location.

sn.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_0: Many companies use dispersed networks and unofficial channels to find leadership talent.
sn.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_1: Significant time is lost due to manual outreach and scattered candidate assessments.
sn.cs_cs_002_challenges_li_1_2: Satisfaction with traditional search methods is consistently low, coupled with strong demand for a specialized, transparent and technically sound process.
sn.cs_cs_002_challenges_p_0: Technology-focused organizations often struggle to find the right leadership talent to drive innovation and growth. Our research shows that the biggest barrier is not a lack of candidates, but the difficulty of identifying, evaluating and retaining high-quality leaders who are both a technical and cultural fit. Traditional search methods that rely on generic approaches and fragmented communication fall short for these specialized roles. This creates significant problems, including lengthened hiring cycles, bad hires, and a lack of confidentiality that senior leaders require.
sn.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_0: This challenge was best understood through our user interviews:
sn.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_2: She struggled to coordinate executive searches across spreadsheets and email threads. She was under constant pressure for updates and risked losing top candidates to slow processes. She needed a single platform to manage searches and make data-driven decisions.
sn.cs_cs_002_building-purple-quarter_p_3: He was overwhelmed by generic approaches from recruiters who ignored his technical background and career goals. He feared that exploring new roles could jeopardize his reputation at his current company. He wanted a discreet, trustworthy partner who would connect him with roles that matched his ambitions and skills.
sn.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_0: Purple Quarter successfully addresses the unique challenges of recruiting tech executives by replacing generic, fragmented processes with a tailored, transparent platform. This case study shows how a user-centric approach that implements deep customer and candidate insights delivers quantifiable and lasting value.
sn.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_1: A generic approach is ineffective for high-profile tech leadership roles. A specialized platform that understands the nuances of technology and culture is essential.
sn.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_2: The platform must provide a seamless, confidential and respectful experience for both the hiring client and the high-level candidate.
sn.cs_cs_002_conclusion_p_3: In a traditionally opaque industry, providing customers with a clear, data-driven view of search progress is a powerful differentiator that builds trust and strengthens partnerships.
sn.cs_cs_002_goal_p_0: We designed Purple Quarter, a specialist executive search firm, to solve the critical talent challenges of technology-driven organizations. Our goal was to bridge the gap between visionary companies and exceptional technology leaders. As an insight-driven partner, Purple Quarter serves as a strategic connector that aligns leading technology experts with an organization's specific technical and cultural goals. By emphasizing deep technical knowledge and a tailored search approach, we ensure that the executive hiring process for our clients is smooth, trustworthy and strategic.

sn.cs_cs_003_goal_p_0: We designed STX, a next-generation online betting platform, to provide a fast, intuitive and transparent betting experience for sports as well as non-traditional markets such as politics and culture. STX was designed as a mobile-first product with full consistency between web and iOS to ensure a seamless experience no matter how or where users place their bets. Our focus has been on reducing friction throughout the entire betting journey – from market decision making to bet placement and portfolio tracking – supporting both casual and experienced bettors.

sn.cs_cs_006_challenges_p_3: Too much data posed the risk of confusion; too few risk losing usable insights.
sn.cs_cs_006_challenges_p_4: Desktop dashboards needed to be seamlessly transferred to mobile devices without losing clarity.
sn.cs_cs_006_challenges_p_5: Non-technical users needed guidance to understand analytics terminology and dashboard features.
sn.cs_cs_006_challenges_p_6: Because users share sensitive business data, trust signals needed to be clear in the design.
sn.cs_cs_006_challenges_p_7: Large datasets caused slow loading times and users needed visible feedback during updates.
sn.cs_cs_006_conclusion_p_1: In the end, our approach proved that powerful analytics doesn't have to feel overwhelming. By combining simplicity, tailored experiences and trust-focused design with fast performance and continuous refinement, we have transformed a complex data platform into an intuitive, engaging tool. This balance of depth and usability ensured that users could focus on insights – rather than having to puzzle out the interface.
sn.cs_cs_006_conclusion_p_3: Even advanced analytics need to feel simple and accessible to drive user engagement.
sn.cs_cs_006_conclusion_p_3_3: Adapting layouts and content to different personas improves relevance and usability.
sn.cs_cs_006_conclusion_p_3_5: Compliance badges, clean layouts and consistent branding reduce hesitation when sharing sensitive data.
sn.cs_cs_006_conclusion_p_3_7: The processes for first-time users can determine acceptance, especially for data-intensive tools.
sn.cs_cs_006_conclusion_p_3_9: Fast, responsive dashboards directly impact user satisfaction.
sn.cs_cs_006_conclusion_p_3_11: Regular user feedback led to small design changes that had a big impact on clarity and usability.
sn.cs_cs_006_goal_p_0: In the early days, many mobile app developers struggled to accurately evaluate their apps, find the right buyers, or realize their full revenue potential. KalaGato is on a mission to solve this by leveraging real user behavior data to identify promising apps, improve their performance, and support a smooth, profitable exit.
sn.cs_cs_006_section_challenges_subtitle: Transform data complexity into design clarity
sn.cs_cs_006_section_solution_subtitle: Transform data complexity into design clarity
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_1: We've turned overwhelming multi-KPI analytics into a streamlined, easy-to-use experience, with intuitive dashboards, role-specific layouts, step-by-step disclosure, and a consistent design system - ensuring every insight is both accessible and actionable.
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_3: Use clean, color-coded charts with key insights above each visualization.
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_4: Role-based layouts – sellers see scoring and optimization tools; Buyers see app potential and acquisition opportunities.
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_4_3: High-level KPIs are displayed first; Users can expand areas for detailed analysis.
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_4_5: Creating a unified design library that ensures consistent colors, typography, and spacing across desktop and mobile.
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_4_7: Add guides, quick-start checklists, and inline help for key metrics.
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_4_9: Display compliance badges (GDPR, SOC2), security icons and professional brand colors for credibility.
sn.cs_cs_006_solution_p_4_11: Adding “last updated” timestamps, subtle animations for updated data, and optimized queries for faster load times.
sn.cs_cs_007_challenges_p_1: Designing layouts that look attractive whether displaying skateboards, clothing, or sports accessories.
sn.cs_cs_007_challenges_p_2: Avoiding confusion while providing quick access to various sports categories.
sn.cs_cs_007_challenges_p_3: Maintaining a consistent brand style across all imagery.
sn.cs_cs_007_challenges_p_4: Ensuring new customers feel confident purchasing from a new online store.
sn.cs_cs_007_challenges_p_5: Sports images can be large and detailed, so we needed to keep loading times short.
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_p_1: Through this project, we realized the importance of flexible layouts for presenting various sports products. High-quality visualizations and clear navigation proved to be far more effective than text-heavy or cluttered designs. Above all, building trust and ensuring fast loading times significantly increased customer trust and conversions.
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_h3_3: Multi-category sports stores need flexible layouts
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_p_3: The design must adapt visually whether a skateboard, a jersey or a tennis racket is shown.
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_p_3_3: Customers respond more strongly to high-quality product and action shots than to text-heavy descriptions.
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_p_3_5: Easy navigation wins over crowded menus.
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_h3_3_6: Trust is essential for first-time buyers
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_p_3_7: Our promises and mentions make the difference.
sn.cs_cs_007_conclusion_p_3_9: Performance optimization has a direct impact on sales.
sn.cs_cs_007_goal_p_0: We designed and developed a Shopify store that caters to multiple sports categories and products while keeping the shopping process simple and engaging.
sn.cs_cs_007_goal_li_2_0: Creating an eye-catching hero space that instantly inspires visitors.
sn.cs_cs_007_goal_li_2_1: Presentation of highlighted and popular products directly on the homepage.
sn.cs_cs_007_goal_li_2_3: Clear presentation of product details with multiple image views and clear pricing.
sn.cs_cs_007_goal_li_2_4: Building trust through publication brand promises and logos.
sn.cs_cs_007_goal_li_2_5: Ensuring a seamless shopping experience on desktop and mobile.
sn.cs_cs_007_section_challenges_subtitle: Build credibility for a new store
sn.cs_cs_007_solution_p_1: Our design approach focused on creating an engaging and trustworthy shopping experience. From a dynamic hero banner to best-selling highlights to visually powerful category tiles, every element is designed for clarity and appeal. We optimized performance, ensured full accountability, and built credibility through trust signals, making the store both fast and user-friendly.
sn.cs_cs_007_solution_span_3_0_1: with lifestyle images and clear calls to action such as “Discover now”.
sn.cs_cs_007_solution_span_3_2_1: with strong visualizations for different sports categories.
sn.cs_cs_007_solution_span_3_3_1: with multiple product images, sizes and purchasing options.
sn.cs_cs_007_solution_span_3_4_1: – “Our Promise” area with icons plus “Mentioned in” logos of well-known publications.
sn.cs_cs_007_solution_span_3_5_1: for faster loading without visual loss.
sn.cs_cs_007_solution_span_3_6_1: for a seamless shopping experience on mobile, tablet and desktop.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_1_0: Inconsistent typography, icon styles, and color usage across web and mobile.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_1_1: Many colors used without clear priority or meaning make scanning difficult.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_1_2: Truncated lesson titles with no easy way to view the full title.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_2_0: The mobile dashboard stacks too many modules on one screen, causing scanning fatigue.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_2_1: Mixed content types in the lesson/chat screens without visual grouping.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_3_0: The web version uses unlabeled icons until hovering - confusing for first-time users.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_3_1: Mobile has several equally important actions, making it unclear which is primary.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_4_0: Low color contrast in some UI elements.
sn.cs_cs_008_challenges_li_4_1: Icon-only navigation reduces usability for visually impaired or first-time users.
sn.cs_cs_008_conclusion_p_1: In the end, our approach proved that powerful analytics doesn't have to feel overwhelming. By combining simplicity, tailored experiences and trust-focused design with fast performance and continuous refinement, we have transformed a complex data platform into an intuitive, engaging tool. This balance of depth and usability ensured that users could focus on insights – rather than having to puzzle out the interface.
sn.cs_cs_008_conclusion_p_3: A common design system should guide typography, colors and spacing for web and mobile.
sn.cs_cs_008_conclusion_p_3_3: Emphasize urgent tasks such as upcoming courses or outstanding assignments over secondary modules.
sn.cs_cs_008_conclusion_p_3_5: Use tabs or expandable panels to reduce vertical scrolling.
sn.cs_cs_008_conclusion_p_3_7: Ensure there is sufficient contrast, always combine icons with text and avoid unnecessary text shortening.
sn.cs_cs_008_conclusion_p_3_9: Start with mobile restrictions to ensure a smoother experience for the primary user group.
sn.cs_cs_008_goal_p_0: With the rapid shift to online education, teachers and students faced numerous challenges.
sn.cs_cs_008_goal_li_1_0: Manage courses, assignments, and discussions across dispersed platforms.
sn.cs_cs_008_goal_li_1_1: Difficulty tracking progress, deadlines and deadlines.
sn.cs_cs_008_goal_li_1_2: Lack of a unified space for conducting lessons, communicating and sharing resources.
sn.cs_cs_008_goal_li_1_3: Teachers spend more time on administrative tasks instead of focusing on teaching.
sn.cs_cs_008_goal_p_3: Creating a single platform for schools, tutors and academies to manage:
sn.cs_cs_008_section_solution_subtitle: Key features to improve teaching and learning
sn.cs_cs_008_solution_p_1: The app included features to address these pain points:
sn.cs_cs_008_solution_p_3: Teachers can plan, edit, and manage lessons in one place that is accessible to students on both web and mobile.
sn.cs_cs_008_solution_p_4: Clear status indicators for “on time”, “late” and “inquiry” so that teachers and students know the current progress.
sn.cs_cs_008_solution_p_5: Public and private group chats, 1-on-1 messaging and class discussions for instant doubt clarification.
sn.cs_cs_008_solution_p_6: Save and share videos, documents and notes directly in the app for quick access.
sn.cs_cs_008_solution_p_7: Teachers can track payments, attendance and student engagement through reports.
sn.cs_cs_008_solution_p_8: Consistent experience across desktop and mobile to ensure accessibility anytime, anywhere.
sn.first_desc: At Ethereal Design we believe that good design is invisible - it just works. We don't just push pixels; We understand your users, your business and your challenges. Our team combines strategy, creativity, and deep UX thinking to create digital experiences that are intuitive, engaging, and results-driven.
sn.home_seo_content_heading: Ethereal Design Studio – UI UX and digital product design
sn.home_seo_p5: Our design process combines research-based insights with modern design systems and cutting-edge front-end technologies. By aligning business goals with user needs, we create digital products that are intuitive, reliable, and scalable across platforms and devices.
sn.home_seo_p6: With experience in fintech, SaaS, e-commerce, and AI-driven platforms, Ethereal Design Studio helps teams launch faster, reduce development friction, and deliver consistent user experiences that adapt as products grow.
sn.midsec_supporting_text: We bring clarity to your product through intelligent UX and effective visual elements

sn.second_subtext_1: You always know what you're paying - no surprises or hidden costs.
sn.teams_trust_card_3_para: We work closely with your team, adapt quickly and deliver on time.
